tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix shared-drift-check routing table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace four slash-format skill names with dash-format so agents can correctly load scaffold skills.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-drift-check/SKILL.md:30-33`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All four skill name entries use dash format (e.g. `nextjs-scaffold`)
- [ ] No slashes remain in the routing table
- [ ] No other lines changed

**Verify:** `grep 'scaffold' skills/shared-drift-check/SKILL.md` → all four rows show dash format

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-drift-check/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'scaffold' skills/shared-drift-check/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 4 entries use dash format", "No slashes in routing table"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Restore 4 missing files to nextjs-scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add hooks/index.ts, lib/constants/index.ts, integrations/schemas/.gitkeep, and integrations/factories.ts to directory tree and Part C verbatim blocks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (tree ~lines 109-127, Part C after line 1668)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Tree shows `src/hooks/index.ts [verbatim — Part C]`
- [ ] Tree shows `src/integrations/factories.ts [verbatim — Part C]`
- [ ] Tree shows `src/integrations/schemas/.gitkeep [verbatim — empty]`
- [ ] Tree shows `src/lib/constants/index.ts [verbatim — Part C]`
- [ ] Part C has verbatim blocks for hooks/index.ts, lib/constants/index.ts, integrations/factories.ts

**Verify:** `grep -n 'hooks/index\|factories\|schemas/.gitkeep\|constants/index' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` → 9 matches

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'hooks/index\\|factories\\|schemas/.gitkeep\\|constants/index' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 new tree entries present", "3 new Part C verbatim blocks present"]}
```
